verses.text: Kumpi a suah ciangin Belshazzar in pawi lianpi khat bawl a, a mi liante tul khat samin amaute tawh zu a ne uh hi

Zu a nek laitakun, Belshazzar in a pa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem biakinnpi panin a puakkhiat ngun hai, kham hai, leh kuangte a va la dingin thu a pia hi. Kumpipa in a miliante leh a zite leh a zineute in tua haite tawh zu a nektheihna dingun hai la dingin thu a pia hi
Thakhatin kham haite, kuangte hong paipih uh a, a vekpi-un tua haite tawh zu a ne uh hi
Amaute in zu ne uh a, kham tawh, ngun tawh, sumngo tawh, sik tawh, sing tawh, suang tawh a kibawl pasian-te a phat uh hi
Thakhat thu-in kumpi innsung meivak a taan' penna lam kawm tungah mihing khut khat hong kilangin lai a hong gelh hi. Tua khut in lai a gelh laitak kumpipa in a mu hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa lau lua mahmah a, a mai daang gawpin a khut a ling kauhkauh hi

Amah in mitphial siamte, aisan siamte, aksi et siamte va sam pak un, ci-in a kiko hi. Tua mite a hong tun' uh ciangin kumpipa in, “Hih lai kigelh a sim thei, a khiatna a hong gen thei peuhmah kumpi puanpi silhsakin, minphatna khamkhi a ngawngah ka oksak ding a, kumpi gamsungah a za lian a thumna-in ka koih ding hi,” a ci hi
Kumpipa' thudot mite hong tung uh a, ahih hangin tua lai a sim thei leh kumpipa tungah a khiatna a gen thei kuamah a om kei uh hi
Tua tak ciangin kumpi Belshazzar lungkham mahmahin a mel daang semsem a, a miliante in a cihna ding mel a thei kei uh hi
Kumpipa leh a miliante gamlum ngeingai-in a om laitakun, pawi innsung-ah kumpinu hong lut a, “Kumpipa aw, sauveipi nungta in. Bang hangin lungkham lua-in na mai daangsak zenzen na hi hiam

Na gamsungah Pasian' kha a nei mi khat a om hi. Na pa kumpi ahih laitakin, tua mipa in pasian-te' pilna tawh a kibang pilna, theihna, leh lungsim navakna a nei hi. Tua hi a, kumpi ahi na pa Nebukhadnezzar in tuapa pen aisan theite, mitphial siamte, khongkhai siamte, leh aksi et siamte' ukpi dingin a koih hi

Amah in a kanzaw siamna nei a, mangkhiat siamna, thudotna haksa nonote dawn'theihna, leh thuthukpite gentel theihna a nei hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Beteshazzar ci-in a min a phuah Daniel samsak in. Tua hi leh amah in a hong gen thei pah ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin thakhatin kumpipa kiangah Daniel a paipih uh hi. Kumpipa in, “Nang Daniel pen kumpi ahi ka pa in Judah gam panin a hong lakkhiat Jew mi salte khat hilo na hi hiam
Nangma sungah Pasian' kha om ahih manin siamna nei-in, lungpilna leh theihna na neihlam ka thei hi
Ka thudot mite leh mitphial siamte, hih lai kigelh a sim ding leh a khiatna a gen dingin a hong pai uh hinapi, a khiatna a theizo kei uh hi

Ahih hangin nangmah in thuthukpi leh kuama theih zawhloh thute gen thei hi, ci-in kong zazo hi. Hih lai kigelh sim thei-in a khiatna nong gen theih leh kumpi puansan kong silhsak ding a, minphatna khamkhi na ngawngah hong oksakin, kumpi gamsungah a za lian thumna-in ka hong koih ding hi,” a ci hi
Daniel in kumpipa kiangah, “Letsong pen kei hong pia kei in la, midang khatpeuh piazaw in. Ahi zongin tua lai kigelh hong simsakin a khiatna kumpipa kong hilh ding hi
A Lianpen Pasian in na pa Nebukhadnezzar kumpi lianin koih a, zahtakna leh vangliatna a pia hi

Amah lianlua mahmah ahih manin gam khempeuh, nam khempeuh, pau khempeuhte in kihta-in a ling uh hi. Mi khatpeuh a thahnop leh that a, a nuntaksaknop leh a nungtasak hi. A ut leh mi khatpeuh pahtawi-in, a ut leh a daisak thei hi
Ahih hangin amah a lung khauhin kiphasak a, gilo lua ahih manin a kumpi tokhom panin kilakhia a, a minthan'na a taan hi

Mihingte lak panin amah kihawlkhia a, ganhing lungsim a nei hi. Gam sakolte tawh tengkhawmin, bawngtal bangin lopa ne a, daitui dal ding neiloin a pualamah a lum hi. A tawpkhakna-ah a Lianpen Pasian in mihingte' kumpi gamte uk a, a teel peuhpeuh kumpi suak hi, ci-in a phawk thei hi
“Ahih hangin a tapa ahi nangmah Belshazzar in hih thu khempeuh na theih hangin na kiniamkhiat tuan kei hi

Vantung Topa' langah na pang hi. A biakinnpi hai leh kuangte la-in sabuai tungah nangmah tawh, na miliante tawh a zineute leh na zite uh tawh zunekna-in na zang uh hi. Theihna a neilo, a mu theilo, khua a za theilo ngun, kham, sumngo, sik, sing, leh suang tawh a kibawl pasian-te' min na phat uh hi. Na nuntakna leh na hihna khempeuh a hong uk Pasian na zahtak kei hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in hih laimalte tua khut a hong gelh sak hi
Tua a kigelh laimal pen hih bang ahi hi: Mene, Mene, Tekel, Parsin
A khiatna zong hih bang ahi hi: Mene beisak ta hi, cihna ahi hi
Tekel pen kitawikhai a cihna hi a, nang hong kitawikhai-in na lekzo kei hi, a cihna ahi hi
Parsin pen kikhen cihna hi a, na gam kikhen khamin Media leh Persia-te a kipiazo hi, a cihna ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Belshazzar in Daniel pen kumpi puansan a silhsak dingin thu pia pah a, minphatna khamkhi a ngawngah a oksak hi. A gamsungah a za lian thumna dingin a koih hi
Tua zan mahmahin Babylon kumpipa Belshazzar kithat a
Media mi Darias kumpi a suak hi. (Tua laitakin Darias kum sawmguk leh kum nih a pha hi.)
